title: Alsophila lunulata

It is a part of the genus Alsophila, which is a group of tree ferns that are native to Australia and New Zealand. The family Cyatheaceae is a group of tree ferns that are commonly known as the "tree fern family". intro: Alsophila lunulata, also known as the 'Fern Tree', is a species of tree fern native to the tropical regions of Australia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, providing relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties.
